title: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military planes from Prestwick Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: John Swinney would 'consider' banning US military planes from Prestwick Airport. "We're seeking clarity from the United Kingdom government about the purpose of American flights that are coming in and out of Prestwick,...
